svg.title: Taxon-Aware AMR Pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing 7 steps from heterogeneous TSV input through taxonomy routing, NCBI data fetching, gene counting, AMR detection, virulence detection, final output, and reporting, producing 5 output files.

g.text: Check NCBI Assembly lineage → Bacterial / Non-bacterial / Skip
Download genome, protein, GFF3 · SQLite cache · datasets CLI
Read annotation stats or parse GFF3 → total gene count
AMRFinderPlus combined mode · genome + protein + GFF
